update mlsd_product_presentation
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{record.banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
new_roducts_img_url_1 = #{record.newRoductsImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_product_presentation
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
new_roducts_img_url_1 = #{newRoductsImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
new_roducts_img_url_2 = #{newRoductsImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , new_roducts_img_url_1 , new_roducts_img_url_2 , new_roducts_img_url_3 , new_roducts_img_url_4 , new_roducts_img_url_5 , new_roducts_img_url_6 , new_roducts_img_url_7 , new_roducts_img_url_8 , signature_cuisineimg_url_1 , signature_cuisineimg_url_2 , signature_cuisineimg_url_3 , signature_cuisineimg_url_4 , signature_cuisineimg_url_5 , signature_cuisineimg_url_6 , new_roducts_title_1 , new_roducts_title_2 , new_roducts_title_3 , new_roducts_title_4 , new_roducts_title_5 , new_roducts_title_6 , new_roducts_title_7 , new_roducts_title_8 , product_list_img_url from mlsd_product_presentation where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
